name: aviation_security_model_based_triage_tool_redwood_lib_eq
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Aviation Security, the situation tagged internally around aviation security model based triage tool redwood lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Fatima Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Fatima Alvarez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Aviation Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Patel
agents.identity: I am Ansel Patel, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Aviation Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Fatima Alvarez must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Fatima Alvarez do?
